demographics.familyStructure: Affluent families, ages 45-70 (decision-makers), multigenerational (including adult children 25-45)
demographics.socioeconomic: Upper-middle to high-net-worth (estates $1M+), professionals/executives in finance, law, real estate
demographics.language: French-primary (Bill 96 compliant), bilingual FR/EN acceptable for premium services

psychographics.mindset: Contemplative, introspective, seeking dignity and solace in grief
psychographics.values: Tasteful restraint over ostentation; heritage preservation; privacy; environmental consciousness (sustainable florals)
psychographics.painPoints: Overly commercial funerals, language barriers in services, lack of personalized digital memorials
psychographics.aspirations: Timeless, elegant tribute that honors loved one; seamless mobile access for family sharing
psychographics.emotionalCore: Zen tranquility amid loss – stone-like permanence, gentle natural movement evoking life's quiet beauty

behaviors.research: Discreet Google searches in French ('fleurs funéraires luxe Québec'), family referrals, estate lawyers
behaviors.purchase: High willingness to pay for exclusivity (CAD 5k-15k+ floral/memorial packages)
behaviors.digital: Mobile-first for planning/sharing (private family portals), subtle interactivity preferred

palette.primary: Cream (#F5F5F0), soft sage green (#A8B5A2), cool stone gray (#D9D4C9)

typography.headings: Serif hierarchy (e.g., Garamond or Playfair Display: elegant, 48-72pt, letter-spaced)
typography.frenchAccents: Support for é, à, ç with refined kerning

imagery.style: Memorial editorial – close-up florals (lilies, eucalyptus) on stone surfaces, soft-focus natural light
imagery.mood: Zen calm: contemplative minimalism, no harsh contrasts

animations.2026Trends: Stone textures (subtle parallax scroll), sway anims (petals/greens 0.5-1s ease-in-out)
animations.microInteractions: Hover blooms (scale 1.05, opacity fade), mobile memorial flow (smooth swipe transitions)

visualTone.layout: Generous whitespace, vertical rhythm, mobile-optimized (thumb-friendly nav, portrait priority)
